falsification_conditions.condition: The S&P 500 closes above the 200-day moving average by 5% within 14 days
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: A strong bullish breakout would contradict the 'HOLD' signal and indicate a trend reversal invalidating the bottom pattern

falsification_conditions.condition: The blowoff score increases to 60 or higher within 14 days
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: A significant rise in blowoff score would indicate overbought conditions and a potential top, directly contradicting the bottom pattern analysis

falsification_conditions.condition: The 10-year Treasury yield drops below 3.5% and remains there for 7 consecutive days
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: Such a yield decline would indicate strong risk-on sentiment contradicting the 'HOLD' signal and suggesting a bullish trend rather than a bottom pattern

doctrine: If you can't list what would prove your call wrong, you don't have a real call.
